figures.caption: Table 3: Summary of IPPg across datasets. Accuracy and average inference cost are reported for text-based and image-based prompting. Cost savings are relative to text-only baselines.
Table 2: FAMMA results by question type and language. Cost savings computed from average per-query costs.
Table 4: Ablation study: Best accuracy and best efficiency configurations across VQA datasets. ΔAcc and %Saved are relative to baseline.
